$appointmentId..read: auth != null && (data.child('doctorId').val() === auth.uid || data.child('doctorUid').val() === auth.uid || data.child('patientUid').val() === auth.uid || data.child('patientId').val() === auth.uid || root.child('admins').child(auth.uid).exists())
$appointmentId..write: auth != null && ((!data.exists() && (newData.child('patientUid').val() === auth.uid || newData.child('patientId').val() === auth.uid)) || data.child('doctorId').val() === auth.uid || data.child('doctorUid').val() === auth.uid || data.child('patientUid').val() === auth.uid || data.child('patientId').val() === auth.uid || root.child('admins').child(auth.uid).exists())
